description: The user enters WiFi credentials in the frontend WebView. The app transmits the SSID and password to IoT devices via Bluetooth BLE using the Improv protocol for device provisioning.

flow_steps.details: The user enters the WiFi SSID and password in the frontend, passed to the Improv handler via external bus.

flow_steps.code: suspend fun provisionDevice(ssid: String, password: String): Boolean { bluetoothPeripheral.send(improvCommand) }
flow_steps.details: WiFi SSID and password are transmitted via Bluetooth Low Energy GATT characteristic write, using the Improv serial protocol.
